description: Australian outlaw motorcycle club formed in Sydney in 1969. Named after a character from The Wizard of Id cartoon, the club uses a jester logo. It has chapters in multiple Australian states and internationally. The club has been involved in rivalries and legal restrictions, with many members switching to the Mongols Motorcycle Club in 2013.
